title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
The following moderation actions were taken after reviewing the abuse queue today:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Permanently banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for suspicious automation behaviour (near-identical repeated replies in help channels). Further violations may result in a ban.
- new_member_17 — Warned for formatting guideline violations. Please review the community posting guidelines.

**No Action (2)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report reviewed; arose from a moderation disagreement. No policy violation found. Closed without action.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Confirmed false positive resulting from a coordinated brigading attempt following a legitimate moderation decision. No action taken.

All 6 reports have been closed. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports — your vigilance keeps this community safe.
